description: Per-URL SEO verdicts from GSC, GA4, Matomo, Clarity, AI citations: refresh/expand/merge/kill.
name: io.github.AutomateLab-tech/seo-performance-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded Google service account JSON with Search Console read access.
environmentVariables.name: GSC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON

environmentVariables.description: Search Console site URL (e.g. sc-domain:example.com or https://example.com/).
environmentVariables.name: GSC_SITE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Matomo auth token with view access.
environmentVariables.name: MATOMO_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Matomo idSite for the site to query.
environmentVariables.name: MATOMO_SITE_ID

environmentVariables.description: GA4 property ID (numeric, no G- prefix).
environmentVariables.name: GA4_PROPERTY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded Google service account JSON with GA4 Data API access.
environmentVariables.name: GA4_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON

environmentVariables.description: Microsoft Clarity Data Export API token.
environmentVariables.name: CLARITY_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: XML sitemap URL used to enumerate posts. Primary platform-agnostic discovery path.
environmentVariables.name: POSTS_SITEMAP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional JSON array overriding sitemap discovery.
environmentVariables.name: POSTS_LIST

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Ghost Admin API base URL. Pair with GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY for richer metadata.
environmentVariables.name: GHOST_ADMIN_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Ghost Admin API key in the form id:secret.
environmentVariables.name: GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional URL of a citation-intelligence MCP server to delegate AI-citation queries to.
environmentVariables.name: CITATION_INTELLIGENCE_URL

title: SEO Performance MCP
